title: `Ophrah #6084
definition:
Ophrah = "fawn"

 n pr m
 1) a Judaite, son of Meonothai

 n pr loc
 2) a town of Benjamin approximately 5 miles (8 km) east of Bethel
 3) a place in Manasseh, native place of Gideon; probably located
    close to Shechem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ophrah = "fawn"

 n pr m
 1) a Judaite, son of Meonothai

 n pr loc
 2) a town of Benjamin approximately 5 miles (8 km) east of Bethel
 3) a place in Manasseh, native place of Gideon; probably located
    close to Shechem

    NASB:  an Isr., also two places in Isr.
